data.title: Global X Launches Bitcoin Covered Call ETF
data.description: According to PANews, asset management firm Global X has announced the launch of a Bitcoin Covered Call ETF, identified by the ticker BCCC. This actively managed fund aims to generate returns through an options strategy on Bitcoin ETF products without directly holding the underlying asset. The ETF employs a synthetic options strategy to establish a long position while earning premium income by selling call options. The options strategy, executed weekly, generates income that is partially distributed to investors on a weekly basis. This ETF is part of Global X's lineup of over 25 income-focused ETF products, designed to balance Bitcoin price volatility with income generation.

data.title: Global X Launches Bitcoin Covered Call Options ETF
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Asset management company Global X announced the launch of the Bitcoin covered call option ETF (code: BCCC). This actively managed fund implements option strategies on Bitcoin ETF products to achieve returns without directly holding the underlying assets. (PRNewswire)

data.title: U.S. Treasury Yields Reach Lowest Level Since Early May
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the yields on U.S. Treasury bonds with maturities ranging from two to ten years have fallen to their lowest levels since May 9. This decline in yields reflects recent market trends and economic conditions.

data.title: K Wave Media Secures $500 Million for Bitcoin Treasury Strategy
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, South Korean entertainment company K Wave Media has entered into a securities purchase agreement valued at up to $500 million to support its Bitcoin-centric crypto treasury strategy. The firm announced on June 4 that it has reached a deal with Bitcoin Strategic Reserve KWM for the sale of ordinary shares, aiming to raise funds for its Bitcoin treasury. This move is part of K Wave Media's broader strategy to integrate Bitcoin into its core operations, emphasizing decentralization, agility, and future-oriented value creation, as stated by Ted Kim, co-interim CEO of the company.

K Wave Media has expressed ambitions to become the "Metaplanet of Korea," a vision that has significantly boosted its stock value following the adoption of a Bitcoin-focused strategy inspired by business intelligence company Strategy, formerly known as MicroStrategy. At the time of reporting, K Wave Media's stock had surged by 162% on Nasdaq, trading at $5.04. The announcement highlighted that the proceeds from the agreement will be directed towards funding K Wave Media's "Bitcoin-centric digital asset treasury strategy," indicating potential investments in other cryptocurrencies alongside Bitcoin.

In addition to bolstering its Bitcoin reserves, K Wave Media plans to utilize the funds for mergers and acquisitions to expand its content and K-POP-related businesses. Bitcoin remains central to these plans, with the company intending to allocate a substantial portion of the proceeds from share sales to the purchasing, long-term holding, and yield optimization of Bitcoin. Furthermore, K Wave Media aims to operate Bitcoin Lightning Network nodes and invest in infrastructure that supports on-chain transaction rewards and decentralization.

K Wave Media joins a growing list of public companies adopting Bitcoin as a corporate reserve asset, a trend initiated by MicroStrategy in 2020 and increasingly embraced by firms in Asia, including Metaplanet. This strategic move underscores the expanding interest in Bitcoin among corporations seeking to leverage its potential for financial growth and innovation.

data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF has a net inflow of 3,302 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF has a net inflow of 38,478 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, 10 US Bitcoin ETFs had a net inflow of 3,302 BTC today, of which ARK 21Shares had an inflow of 1,317 BTC and currently holds 46,614 BTC, worth $4.88 billion; 9 Ethereum ETFs had a net inflow of 38,478 ETH, of which BlackRock had an inflow of 29,360 ETH and currently holds 1,465,449 ETH, worth $3.82 billion.

data.title: BlackRock BUIDL Fund paid dividends of more than $10 million in May
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: BlackRock's tokenized money market fund BUIDL announced a dividend of more than $10 million in May, setting a record high for a single month. In the May dividend, the Ethereum network accounted for 93.7% (about $9.37 million), and the remaining chains accounted for 6.3% in total. Since its launch, the fund has paid a total of $43.4 million in dividends, and currently has a management scale of $2.91 billion, maintaining its position as the world's largest tokenized money fund. BUIDL was launched by BlackRock in cooperation with Securitize. Investment targets include U.S. Treasuries, cash and repurchase agreements, and tokens are issued through 7 blockchains including Ethereum and Solana. (Bitcoin.com)

data.title: U.S. Service Sector Faces Contraction Amid Rising Input Costs
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the U.S. service sector experienced its first contraction in nearly a year in May, with rising input prices indicating a potential period of slow economic growth and high inflation.

The Institute for Supply Management (ISM) reported on Wednesday that the U.S. non-manufacturing PMI fell to 49.9, dropping below the 50 threshold for the first time since June 2024. The new orders index decreased from 52.3 in April to 46.4, possibly due to the diminishing boost from tariff-related advantages.

Service sector clients have expressed concerns that inventories are higher than demand, which is not a positive sign for short-term economic activity. Supplier delivery performance continues to worsen, with extended factory delivery times suggesting supply chain constraints that could drive inflation higher due to shortages. Businesses are also attempting to pass on tariff costs to consumers. The service input price index surged from 65.1 in April to 68.7, reaching its highest level since November 2022, reinforcing this trend. Most economists anticipate that the impact of tariffs on inflation and employment may become evident in the so-called hard economic data over the summer.

data.description: According to PANews, Ethereum (ETH) has recently dropped below the $2600 mark. The current price is reported at $2598.81 per coin, reflecting a daily decrease of 0.94%.

data.title: Whale James Wynn Faces $25 Million Liquidation Loss
data.description: According to Odaily, blockchain analytics platform Arkham reported on X that prominent whale James Wynn is currently facing challenges, having recently incurred a liquidation loss of $25 million.

data.title: Bitcoin News: Bitcoin Profit Taking Surges Post-Golden Cross, On-Chain Realized Gains Top $500M Per Hour
data.description: Bitcoin (BTC) holders are accelerating profit-taking activity following a confirmed golden cross on May 22, when BTC’s 50-day simple moving average (SMA) surpassed its 200-day SMA. The event coincided with a record price peak of $111,000.Realized Profits Surpass $500M per HourAccording to on-chain data from Glassnode, entity-adjusted realized profits exceeded $500 million per hour three times within 24 hours on June 3. This metric tracks total U.S. dollar profits from all moved coins whose last on-chain movement price was lower than the transaction price.This marks the highest level of realized profit-taking activity since February and reflects heightened selling pressure despite bullish technical indicators.SOPR and Whale Data Confirm Distribution PhaseGlassnode’s adjusted Spent Output Profit Ratio (SOPR) also shows a rising trend in profit realization. The platform reports that the average coin moved is locking in gains of approximately 16%, with less than 8% of historical trading days offering higher profitability for investors.Meanwhile, large holders — entities with 10,000 to 100,000 BTC — have continued a multi-year trend of reducing holdings. Blockchain analyst Willy Woo notes that this group’s supply has declined by approximately 40% over eight years, dropping from 2.7 million BTC to around 1.6 million BTC as of June 2025.Bitcoin Holds Key Support at $105,000BTC is currently trading at $105,750, retracing approximately 5.5% from its recent peak. The asset briefly recovered to $106,800 on June 3 before returning to the $105,000 support range during early trading hours on June 4.Bitcoin has now held above the six-figure threshold for 27 consecutive days, setting a new record and surpassing the previous high of 18 days above $100,000 in January 2025.

data.title: James Wynn's Bitcoin long position still has 770 BTC, with a liquidation price of $104,035
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of the on-chain analyst Ember, James Wynn has just been liquidated for 240 BTC, and then he reduced his position by 191 BTC. Now he still has 770 BTC in his BTC long position, with a position value of 80.5 million US dollars, and the current liquidation price is 104,035 US dollars.

data.title: Treasure Global Launches $100 Million Digital Asset Finance Strategy
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: E-commerce platform operator Treasure Global Inc. (NASDAQ: TGL) announced the launch of a $100 million digital asset fund to strengthen its digital infrastructure and support the launch of an AI consumer intelligence platform. The program is funded in two parts: $50 million from existing equity financing agreements and another $50 million from new capital injections from strategic institutional investors. The funds will be used in stages to allocate blockchain native assets such as Bitcoin, Ethereum and regulated stablecoins, aiming to improve capital efficiency and lay the foundation for future tokenization, loyalty programs and blockchain settlement systems. (GlobeNewswire)

data.title: U.S. May PMI Data Exceeds Expectations
data.description: According to Odaily, the final reading for the U.S. S&P Global Services PMI in May was 53.7, surpassing the expected 52.3 and the previous value of 52.3. Additionally, the final U.S. S&P Global Composite PMI for May reached 53, exceeding the forecast of 52.1 and the prior figure of 52.1. Following the release of the PMI data, there was minimal short-term fluctuation in the spot prices of gold and silver, as well as the U.S. Dollar Index (DXY).

data.title: Binance to Launch Spot Altcoin LiquidityBoost Program
data.description:
According to Binance's official announcement, the cryptocurrency exchange is set to introduce the Spot Altcoin LiquidityBoost Program. This initiative aims to enhance liquidity and trading efficiency for selected altcoin trading pairs on the Spot market. The program is designed to offer users tighter spreads, reduced slippage, and an overall improved trading experience. The qualification period for this program will begin on 2025-06-09 00:00 (UTC).

**Program Details**

- Liquidity providers will undergo weekly reviews based on a performance review mechanism.

- To qualify for Tier 1 rebate rates, users must achieve a combined Maker Volume Percentage of 0.5% against any of the eligible altcoin spot trading pairs.

- For Tier 2 rebate rates, a combined Maker Volume Percentage of 1.0% is required.

- The Maker Fee Rebate Rate is set at -0.005% for Tier 1 and -0.010% for Tier 2.

- Maker fee rebate rates will be updated weekly starting from 2025-06-17 00:00 (UTC).

- Accounts qualifying for both the Spot Liquidity Provider Program and the Altcoin LiquidityBoost Program will receive the more favorable fee rate for traded pairs.

**Eligible Altcoin Spot Trading Pairs**

- The program includes trading pairs such as INITUSDT, EOSUSDT, HYPERUSDT, PARTIUSDT, ICPUSDT, KERNELUSDT, CFXUSDT, WUSDT, KMNOUSDT, IOTXUSDT, ONDOUSDT, TONUSDT, FILUSDT, WCTUSDT, BABYUSDT, SXTUSDT, SYRUPUSDT, and STOUSDT.

**Participation Requirements**

- Users with a 30-day trading volume exceeding 20,000,000 USDT equivalent on Binance Spot and Margin, or as evidenced across other platforms, are invited to join.

- Interested participants must provide proof of trading volume to mmprogram@binance.com or contact their sales or key account coverage team.

**Additional Notes**

- The program is limited to specified altcoin trading pairs on Binance.com.

- Maker rebates will be settled in USDT.

- Rebate eligibility is based on weekly performance across eligible altcoin pairs.

- Maker Fee Rebates are effective from 00:00 (UTC) each Tuesday to 23:59 (UTC) the following Monday and are paid hourly.

- Users can check their rebate history via Orders > Transaction History > Distribution > Fiat and Spot.

- Participants in multiple liquidity programs will receive the more favorable rebate ratio.

- Users failing to qualify for rebates for three consecutive weeks will be removed from the program.

Binance reserves the right to amend or terminate the program at its discretion, considering factors such as regulatory changes, technical issues, or the need to protect users and the platform. For more details, users can refer to the VIP and Institutional Services page. Discrepancies between the original English content and translations may occur, and the English version should be considered the most accurate.

data.title: Nobel Laureates Urge Senate to Reject House Tax and Spending Bill
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, six Nobel Prize-winning economists have expressed concern over a tax and spending bill recently passed by House Republicans. The economists have issued an open letter highlighting their worries about significant cuts to Medicaid and the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP). They argue that these programs are vital for American families.

The House version of the bill proposes a $700 billion reduction in Medicaid spending and a $300 billion cut to SNAP, marking the largest reductions in the history of both programs. The economists are urging the Senate to reject the bill and to start anew in crafting the budget.

data.title: U.S. Stock Market Opens with Slight Gains as Cryptocurrency Stocks Decline
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the U.S. stock market opened with modest gains across its three major indices. However, cryptocurrency-related stocks experienced slight declines. MicroStrategy saw a decrease of 0.95%, MARA Holdings fell by 1.08%, and Riot Platforms dropped by 1%. The market movements reflect ongoing volatility in the cryptocurrency sector.
